name: High temp1
query: SELECT temp1, time FROM plc_thermometer ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

name: Low temp1
query: SELECT temp1, time FROM plc_thermometer ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

name: High temp2
query: SELECT temp2, time FROM plc_thermometer ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

name: Low temp2
query: SELECT temp2, time FROM plc_thermometer ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
